mcqs.question: What is the primary function of the main thread in Java?

options.text: To create and start other threads.
To execute the main method of the program.
To interrupt other threads.
To handle exceptions.

mcqs.explanation: The main thread is responsible for executing the main method of the program, which is the entry point of the Java application.

mcqs.question: What is the default priority of the main thread in Java?

options.text: 1 (MIN_PRIORITY)
5 (NORM_PRIORITY)
10 (MAX_PRIORITY)

mcqs.explanation: The default priority of the main thread is 5 (NORM_PRIORITY), which is the middle priority level.

mcqs.question: What happens when the main thread is interrupted?

options.text: It stops executing the main method of the program and throws an InterruptedException.
It creates and starts other threads.
It continues executing the main method of the program.
It sets the priority of the current thread.

mcqs.explanation: When the main thread is interrupted, it stops executing the main method of the program and throws an InterruptedException.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the Thread.sleep() method?

options.text: To pause the execution of the current thread for a specified period of time.
To interrupt the current thread.
To create and start a new thread.
To set the priority of the current thread.

mcqs.explanation: The Thread.sleep() method is used to pause the execution of the current thread for a specified period of time.

mcqs.question: What is the difference between Thread.currentThread() and Thread.sleep()?

options.text: Thread.currentThread() returns the current thread, while Thread.sleep() pauses the current thread.
Thread.currentThread() pauses the current thread, while Thread.sleep() returns the current thread.
Thread.currentThread() creates a new thread, while Thread.sleep() interrupts the current thread.
Thread.currentThread() sets the priority of the current thread, while Thread.sleep() gets the priority of the current thread.

mcqs.explanation: Thread.currentThread() returns the current thread, while Thread.sleep() pauses the current thread for a specified period of time.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the Thread.setName() method?

options.text: To set the priority of the current thread.
To set the name of the current thread.
To interrupt the current thread.
To create and start a new thread.

mcqs.explanation: The Thread.setName() method is used to set the name of the current thread.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the Thread.getId() method?

options.text: To set the priority of the current thread.
To get the name of the current thread.
To get the unique identifier of the current thread.
To create and start a new thread.

mcqs.explanation: The Thread.getId() method is used to get the unique identifier of the current thread.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the Thread.isAlive() method?

options.text: To check if the current thread is alive.
To set the priority of the current thread.
To interrupt the current thread.
To create and start a new thread.

mcqs.explanation: The Thread.isAlive() method is used to check if the current thread is alive.
